evidence_records.raw_value: Reuters: 'Talks between US and Ukrainian officials on rare earth cooperation are ongoing, but no deal is imminent, according to three officials familiar with the discussions.'
evidence_records.notes: Tier-1 wire service, multiple unnamed sources.

evidence_records.raw_value: AP: 'Zelenskyy spokesperson dismisses reports of an imminent mineral deal, calling discussions premature. No timeline has been set.'
evidence_records.notes: Tier-1 wire service, official Ukrainian government spokesperson.

evidence_records.raw_value: Polymarket YES token at $0.09. Market implies 9% probability of deal. Volume: ~$6.5M cumulative.
evidence_records.notes: Market price pre-manipulation. At this point, market reflected consensus with news sources.
